description: Interactive Go CLI (awsops) for administering Caltech Library DLD's AWS EC2 instances, AMIs, and S3 backup archives, with support for tag management, cloud-init inspection, and backup archival to S3.
name: awstools
releaseNotes: Real-AWS verified 2026-07-08: EC2/AMI lifecycle management, tag management, cloud-init inspection, and S3 Backup Archive & Trim, across two AWS regions.
